description_long: This is a classic wooden canoe with a deep red exterior hull and a natural wood interior. The canoe features three wooden bench seats spanning its width, providing seating for multiple occupants. The interior sides and floor are constructed from planks, showing a weathered, rustic finish. Two metal carrying handles are attached to the gunwales, one at each end, for easy transport. The gunwales run along the top edge, reinforcing the structure and adding to the canoe's durability. The overall design is utilitarian yet traditional, suitable for use on calm urban lakes or rivers.
description: A traditional wooden canoe with a red exterior, natural wood interior, three bench seats, and metal carrying handles on the gunwales.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the red hull, wooden interior, and all three bench seats.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed bow, interior seating arrangement, and the width of the canoe.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, displaying the red hull and wooden interior from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the stern, interior benches, and the overall depth of the canoe.
